title: Green Thumb Industries Opens 100th & 101st RISE Dispensaries in Major Expansion
text: Green Thumb Industries achieved a significant milestone by opening its 100th retail location, RISE Dispensary Carson City on US HWY 50 in Nevada. The company subsequently announced the opening of its 101st retail location with RISE Dispensary Brooklyn Park on November 23, 2024. This expansion demonstrates Green Thumb's continued commitment to geographic diversification and market penetration. The company operates RISE dispensaries across 14 U.S. markets and serves millions of patients and customers each year. Since opening its doors in 2015, RISE has grown its national footprint to over 100 retail locations. The company also announced the opening of its 104th retail location nationwide and 22nd store in Florida with RISE Dispensary Ocala on April 29, 2025. Green Thumb entered Florida in 2018 and currently operates RISE dispensaries across 21 other locations in the state, including major cities like Orlando, Tampa, and West Palm Beach, with delivery services available in surrounding areas.
